description: Align citation, dashboard, OSF, Hugging Face and archive records for a citable public product.

gates.evidence: HF dataset/Space destination report has zero mismatches.

The v2 release-asset inventory requires wheel, sdist, source archive, both SBOMs, release manifest and attestation receipts. Signed final assets remain downstream of mapping, dashboard and OSF registration evidence gates.

Deterministic Zenodo/DataCite metadata, a fail-closed v2 inventory contract and token-gated plan/draft/reserve/publish/verify workflow exist. Draft, reservation and publication all require the complete archive gate and remote checksum parity. Papers and preprints are excluded.
